title: Rayman 2: The Great Escape Gameplay Map

narrative.description: Ubisoft's Dreamcast/N64/PS1 classic follows Rayman through the Glade of Dreams with lums, helicopter hair, and cinematic set-piece platforming against the pirate invasion.
narrative.core_loop: Free Teensies, collect lums, shoot magic spheres, and defeat Admiral Razorbeard across hub-connected dream worlds.

mechanics.map_notes: Rayman's helicopter hair and strafe-shoot define fluid 3D traversal.
mechanics.expression: Rayman's helicopter hair and strafe-shoot define fluid 3D traversal.

mechanics.map_notes: Lums and Teensies gate world progress and secret levels.
mechanics.expression: Lums and Teensies gate world progress and secret levels.

mechanics.map_notes: Magic spheres, swing chains, and rocket rides open new routes per world.
mechanics.expression: Magic spheres, swing chains, and rocket rides open new routes per world.

mechanics.map_notes: Magic fist fires immediately while platforming.
mechanics.expression: Magic fist fires immediately while platforming.

mechanics.map_notes: Pirates, water, and chase sequences test movement mastery.
mechanics.expression: Pirates, water, and chase sequences test movement mastery.

mechanics.map_notes: Guardian bosses and Razorbeard gate story milestones.
mechanics.expression: Guardian bosses and Razorbeard gate story milestones.

mechanics.map_notes: Bosses like Grolgoth follow learnable sphere-counter patterns.
mechanics.expression: Bosses like Grolgoth follow learnable sphere-counter patterns.

mechanics.map_notes: Final Razorbeard fight spans multiple arena configurations.
mechanics.expression: Final Razorbeard fight spans multiple arena configurations.

mechanics.map_notes: Hidden lums and secret levels extend completion.
mechanics.expression: Hidden lums and secret levels extend completion.

mechanics.map_notes: Cage breaks save Teensie progress; death respawns at level start.
mechanics.expression: Cage breaks save Teensie progress; death respawns at level start.

mechanics.map_notes: Speed challenges and narrow ledges demand exact control.
mechanics.expression: Speed challenges and narrow ledges demand exact control.

mechanics.map_notes: Pirate wind-ups telegraph before cannon fire.
mechanics.expression: Pirate wind-ups telegraph before cannon fire.

mechanics.map_notes: Helicopter hair extends jumps across chasms.
mechanics.expression: Helicopter hair extends jumps across chasms.

mechanics.map_notes: Health cages restore energy; death restarts from level entrance.
mechanics.expression: Health cages restore energy; death restarts from level entrance.

design_intent.player_fantasy: Experience Rayman 2: The Great Escape through its core platformer loop.
